en: Jacob lived in the land of his father's sojournings, in the land of Canaan.
zh: 雅各住在他父親寄居的地方，就是迦南地。

en: These are the generations of Jacob. Joseph, being seventeen years old, was pasturing the flock with his brothers. He was a boy with the sons of Bilhah and Zilpah, his father's wives. And Joseph brought a bad report of them to their father.
zh: 雅各的歷史記在下面：約瑟十七歲的時候，與他的哥哥們一同牧羊。他是個孩童，與他父親的妾，辟拉和悉帕的眾子，常在一起。約瑟把他們的惡行報告給父親。

en: Now Israel loved Joseph more than any other of his sons, because he was the son of his old age. And he made him a robe of many colors.
zh: 以色列愛約瑟過於愛其他的兒子，因為約瑟是他年老時生的。他給約瑟做了一件彩色長衣。

en: But when his brothers saw that their father loved him more than all his brothers, they hated him and could not speak peacefully to him.
zh: 約瑟的哥哥們見父親愛約瑟過於愛他們，就恨約瑟，不能與他和和氣氣地說話。

en: Now Joseph had a dream, and when he told it to his brothers they hated him even more.
zh: 約瑟作了一個夢，把夢告訴哥哥們，他們就越發恨他。

en: He said to them, "Hear this dream that I have dreamed:
zh: 約瑟對他們說：“請聽我所作的這個夢：

en: Behold, we were binding sheaves in the field, and behold, my sheaf arose and stood upright. And behold, your sheaves gathered around it and bowed down to my sheaf."
zh: 我們正在田間捆麥子，我的麥捆忽然站立起來，你們的麥捆都來圍著我的下拜。”

en: His brothers said to him, "Are you indeed to reign over us? Or are you indeed to rule over us?" So they hated him even more for his dreams and for his words.
zh: 他的哥哥們對他說：“你真的要作我們的王嗎？真的要管轄我們嗎？”他們就為了約瑟的夢和他的話，越發恨他。

en: Then he dreamed another dream and told it to his brothers and said, "Behold, I have dreamed another dream. Behold, the sun, the moon, and eleven stars were bowing down to me."
zh: 後來約瑟又作了一個夢，也把夢向哥哥們述說了。他說：“我又作了一個夢，我夢見太陽、月亮和十一顆星向我下拜。”

en: But when he told it to his father and to his brothers, his father rebuked him and said to him, "What is this dream that you have dreamed? Shall I and your mother and your brothers indeed come to bow ourselves to the ground before you?"
zh: 約瑟把夢向他父親和哥哥們述說了，他父親就斥責他，說：“你所作的這夢是甚麼夢呢？我和你母親，以及你的兄弟，真的要來俯伏在地向你下拜嗎？”

en: And his brothers were jealous of him, but his father kept the saying in mind.
zh: 他哥哥們都嫉妒他，他父親卻把這事記在心裡。

en: Now his brothers went to pasture their father's flock near Shechem.
zh: 約瑟的哥哥們去了示劍，牧放他們父親的羊群。

en: And Israel said to Joseph, "Are not your brothers pasturing the flock at Shechem? Come, I will send you to them." And he said to him, "Here I am."
zh: 以色列對約瑟說：“你的哥哥們不是在示劍牧放羊群嗎？來吧，我要派你到他們那裡去。”約瑟回答他：“我在這裡。”

en: So he said to him, "Go now, see if it is well with your brothers and with the flock, and bring me word." So he sent him from the Valley of Hebron, and he came to Shechem.
zh: 以色列對他說：“你去看看你的哥哥們是不是平安，羊群是不是平安，就回來告訴我。”於是打發他離開希伯崙谷，他就到示劍去了。

en: And a man found him wandering in the fields. And the man asked him, "What are you seeking?"
zh: 有人遇見約瑟在田間迷了路，就問他說：“你找甚麼？”

en: "I am seeking my brothers," he said. "Tell me, please, where they are pasturing the flock."
zh: 他回答：“我正在找我的哥哥們，請你告訴我他們在哪裡牧放羊群。”

en: And the man said, "They have gone away, for I heard them say, 'Let us go to Dothan.'" So Joseph went after his brothers and found them at Dothan.
zh: 那人說：“他們已經離開了這裡；我聽見他們說：‘我們要到多坍去。’”於是約瑟去追尋哥哥們，結果在多坍找到了他們。

en: They saw him from afar, and before he came near to them they conspired against him to ki i him.
zh: 他們遠遠就看見了他；趁他還沒有走近，大家就謀害他，要把他殺死。

en: They said to one another, "Here comes this dreamer.
zh: 他們彼此說：“看哪，那作夢的人來了。

en: Come now, let us kill him and throw him into one of the pits. Then we will say that a fierce animal has devoured him, and we will see what will become of his dreams."
zh: 來吧，我們把他殺了，丟在一個枯井裡，就說有猛獸把他吃了。我們要看看他的夢將來要怎麼樣。”

en: But when Reuben heard it, he rescued him out of their hands, saying, "Let us not take his life."
zh: 流本聽見了，要救約瑟脫離他們的手。他說：“我們不可取他的性命。”

en: And Reuben said to them, "Shed no blood; cast him into this pit here in the wilderness, but do not lay a hand on him"- that he might rescue him out of their hand to restore him to his father.
zh: 流本又對他們說：“不可流他的血，可以把他丟在這曠野的枯井裡，不可下手害他。”流本的意思是要救他脫離他們的手，把他帶回去給他的父親。

en: So when Joseph came to his brothers, they stripped him of his robe, the robe of many colors that he wore.
zh: 約瑟到了哥哥們那裡，他們就脫去他的外衣，就是他穿在身上的那件彩衣。

en: And they took him and cast him into a pit. The pit was empty; there was no water in it.
zh: 他們拿住約瑟，把他丟在枯井裡。那井是空的，裡面沒有水。

en: Then they sat down to eat. And looking up they saw a caravan of Ishmaelites coming from Gilead, with their camels bearing gum, balm, and myrrh, on their way to carry it down to Egypt.
zh: 他們坐下吃飯，舉目觀看，見有一群以實瑪利人從基列來。他們的駱駝載著香料、乳香和沒藥，要帶下埃及去。

en: Then Judah said to his brothers, "What profit is it if we kill our brother and conceal his blood?
zh: 猶大對他的眾兄弟說：“我們殺了我們的兄弟，把他的血隱藏起來，究竟有甚麼益處呢？

en: Come, let us sell him to the Ishmaelites, and let not our hand be upon him, for he is our brother, our own flesh." And his brothers listened to him.
zh: 我們不如把他賣給以實瑪利人，不要下手害他，因為他是我們的兄弟，我們的骨肉。”眾兄弟就聽從了他。

en: Then Midianite traders passed by. And they drew Joseph up and lifted him out of the pit, and sold him to the Ishmaelites for twenty shekels of silver. They took Joseph to Egypt.
zh: 有些米甸的商人經過那裡，約瑟的哥哥們就把約瑟從枯井裡拉上來，以二十塊銀子把他賣給以實瑪利人。以實瑪利人就把約瑟帶到埃及去了。

en: When Reuben returned to the pit and saw that Joseph was not in the pit, he tore his clothes
zh: 流本回到枯井那裡，見約瑟不在井裡，就撕裂自己的衣服。

en: and returned to his brothers and said, "The boy is gone, and I, where shall I go?"
zh: 他回到兄弟們那裡去，說：“孩子不見了，我可到哪裡去呢？”

en: Then they took Joseph's robe and slaughtered a goat and dipped the robe in the blood.
zh: 於是，他們宰了一隻公山羊，把約瑟的長衣蘸在血裡；

en: And they sent the robe of many colors and brought it to their father and said, "This we have found; please identify whether it is your son's robe or not."
zh: 然後打發人把彩衣送到他們父親那裡，說：“這是我們找到的。請你認一認，是你兒子的長衣不是？”

en: And he identified it and said, "It is my son's robe. A fierce animal has devoured him. Joseph is without doubt torn to pieces."
zh: 他認出這件長衣，就說：“是我兒子的長衣，有猛獸把他吃了。約瑟真的被撕碎了。”

en: Then Jacob tore his garments and put sackcloth on his loins and mourned for his son many days.
zh: 雅各就撕裂自己的衣服，腰束麻布，為他兒子哀悼了很多日子。

en: All his sons and all his daughters rose up to comfort him, but he refused to be comforted and said, "No, I shall go down to Sheol to my son, mourning." Thus his father wept for him.
zh: 他所有的兒女都起來安慰他，他卻不肯接受他們的安慰，說：“我要悲悲哀哀地下到陰間，到我的兒子那裡去。”約瑟的父親就為他哀哭。

en: Meanwhile the Midianites had sold him in Egypt to Potiphar, an officer of Pharaoh, the captain of the guard.
zh: 米甸人後來把約瑟賣到埃及去，賣給法老的一個臣宰，軍長波提乏。
